what_it_does: An empty .gitkeep placeholder file whose only function is to make Git track the otherwise-empty atomicity/ directory.
observations: File is empty (0 bytes / no content).
Conventional name (.gitkeep) used to preserve an empty directory in version control.
Lives in an 'atomicity/' directory whose purpose is not described by this file.
notes: An empty .gitkeep placeholder keeping the atomicity/ directory under version control; carries no content of its own.

intention_signals: Reserving an empty directory (atomicity/) in the repo so it exists for future content before anything is placed there.
